_comment: Generated-style leaf registry (hand-authored in this prototype). jtbd_id and persona are CANONICAL Ritual taxonomy values from Ritual's source of truth. Validated by scripts/validate-leaves.mjs against canonical/jtbd-allowlist.json. Never hand-invent jtbd_id.

leaves.title: Service contract readiness
leaves.description: Scope a new backend service or API before building — boundaries, contracts, dependencies, and the constraints that aren't written down yet.

leaves.title: API error-handling check
leaves.description: A known, repeatable review of error handling for a backend endpoint. No discovery needed — run the checklist.
recipe: Every endpoint returns typed, documented error shapes — no bare 500s.
Inputs are validated at the boundary; validation failures return 4xx, not 5xx.
External calls have timeouts and explicit failure handling.
Errors are logged with correlation/context; no secrets in messages.
Idempotency / retry behavior is defined for unsafe operations.
leaves.done_criteria: Each checklist item is confirmed present in the diff or raised as an explicit gap.

leaves.title: Implementation plan brief
leaves.description: Turn an agreed backend change into a validated implementation plan — sub-problems, sequencing, and dependencies — before writing code.
